Name: Hydration bomb
Ingredients: 1 cup watermelon, 3/4 cup pineapple, 1/2 pc passion fruit (or 2 teaspoon passion fruit pulp), 1 tablespoon lemon balm leaves (without stems), water after need (1 1/2 tablespoon or more), 1 leaf lemon balm for garnishing
Overview: This smoothie is a hydration bomb. Great after training or as a part of reconvalescence after sickness or injury. Great for optimal hydration in hot environments.
Directions:
-        Cut watermelon and pineapple into smaller pieces
-        Open passion fruit and scoop out the pulp
-        Remove stems from lemon balm (use the leaves only)
-        Put all ingredients into a blender, add water and blend well together
-        Serve with a piece of lemon balm on top and enjoy ☺
Benefits:
Hydration
Reconvalescence 
after sickness or injury

Name: Piña Colada
Ingredients: 1 cup pineapple, 1/2 pc mango (ca 150 g), 1/2 pc passion fruit (or 2 teaspoon passion fruit pulp), 4 pc cucumber slices (ca 30 g), 1 1/2 tablespoon (20 ml) fresh coconut water, desiccated coconut (ca 1/2 teaspoon) and 1 thin slice cucumber for garnishing
Overview: This smoothie is great for hydration, detoxification and simply to bring a tropical summer vibe into your home.
Directions:
-        Cut pineapple and mango into smaller pieces
-        Open passion fruit and scoop out the pulp
-        Slice cucumber into round thick slices
-        Put all ingredients into a blender, add coconut water and blend well together
-        Serve with desiccated coconut and one thin cucumber slice on top and enjoy ☺

Name: Heavy metal detox and Immunity booster
Ingredients: 1 pc mango (ca 300 g), 1 big handful parsley (ca 5 g), 1/2 teaspoon turmeric, 1/2 teaspoon ginger, 1 teaspoon fresh tamarind (or tamarind paste), 1/3 cup (ca 80 ml) freshly squeezed orange juice
Overview: This smoothie is amazing immunity booster and inflamation figher as well as support for detoxification.
Directions:
-        Squeeze couple of oranges or buy a freshly made cold-pressed orange juice 
-        Cut mango, turmeric and ginger into smaller pieces
-        Wash and rinse parsley well and cut it into smaller pieces, remove stalks if you desire 
-        Remove stones from tamarind and cut them into smaller pieces or add 1 teaspoon of tamarind paste instead if you are using that
-        Put all ingredients into a blender, add orange juice and blend well together
-        Serve with grated ginger or turmeric on top and enjoy ☺

Name: Green Goddess
Ingredients: 2 1/2 banana, 1/2 celery stalk, 4 pc cucumber slices (ca 30 g), 1 small stalk Aloe Vera (ca 70 g), 1 small head Bok Choy (ca 40 g), 3 tablespoon fresh coconut water (ca 45 ml), Aloe Vera for garnishing
Overview: This smoothie is alkalizing, anti-inflammatory, regulating blood sugar and supportive for diabetes patients
Directions:
-        Cut bananas, celery and Bok Choy into smaller pieces
-        Make 4 round cucumber slices 
-        Remove skin on Aloe Vera and use the gel inside
-        Put all ingredients into a blender, add fresh coconut water and blend well together
-        Serve with Aloe Vera on top and enjoy ☺

Name: Antioxidant bomb
Ingredients: 1 1/2 banana, 1 cup (ca 150 g) frozen blueberries, 2 small soft dried dates (ca 10 g), 3 leaves kale (ca 30 g) - curly kale or any other type, 3 tablespoon (ca 45 ml) fresh coconut water, cocoa nibs and dried Goji berries for garnishing
Overview: This smoothie is fullpacked with anti-oxidants as well as high dose of vit. K, supporting blood clotting and building up the bones
Directions:
-        Cut bananas into smaller pieces
-        Remove stones from dates and cut them into smaller pieces
-        Remove stems from kale and cut or rip the leaves into smaller pieces
-        Put all ingredients into a blender, add frozen blueberries and fresh coconut water and blend well together
-        Serve with cocoa nibs and Goji berries on top and enjoy ☺

Name: Dragon fruit Cream
Ingredients: 1 1/2 banana, 1 package frozen dragon fruit or 1/4 pc fresh dragon fruit (ca 100 g), 2 tablespoon dried Goji berries, 2 tabelespoon (ca 30 ml) fresh coconut water, cocoa nibs and Goji berries for garnishing
Overview: Amazing ,,nice cream,, (a vegan ice-cream). Meal replacement. Gut and liver support. An iron bomb. Reduces anxiety and can prevent cancer.
Directions:
-        Cut bananas and dragon fruit into smaller pieces
-        Remove stones from dates and cut them into smaller pieces
-        Put all ingredients into a blender, add Goji berries and fresh coconut water and blend well together 
-        Add water little by little ! We wanna create an ,,ice-cream consistence,, not a watery smoothie
-        Serve with cocoa nibs and dried Goji berries on top and enjoy ☺
Benefits:
Gut and liver health, 
Iron rich, 
Reduces anxiety

Name: Acai-mulberry smoothie
Ingredients: 1 1/2 banana, 100gr (1 package) frozen or fresh acai pulp, 2 leaves kale (green curly or another type), 5 small dates (ca 30g), 2 tablespoon mulberries (use blueberries or any othe berries if mulberries are not available), 1 tablespoon water
Overview: This smoothie helps to regulate digestion, supports brain health and strengthens immune system.
Directions:
- Cut bananas and kale into smaller pieces, remove stems from kale. 
  - Remove stones from dates and cut them into smaller pieces. 
  - Put banans, kale, dates, acai and mulberries into a blender. 
  - Blend well together. 
  - Serve with mulberries on top and enjoy ☺
Benefits: Digestion. Braiin health. Immunity. Prevents Cold and Flu.

1. Combine all ingredients except 1/2 tablespoon yogurt in a blender. Add more ice or water to reach the desired consistency.

3. Pour the smoothie into the cup and enjoy your blue sky

Name: Inflamation fighter and Mood booster

-        Cut pineapple into smaller pieces
-        Open passion fruit and scoop out the pulp
-        Remove stems from lemon balm (use the leaves only)
-        Put all ingredients into a blender, add chia seeds and orange juice 
-        Blend well together 
-        Serve with extra chia seeds on top and enjoy ☺

Anti-inflammatory
Immunity booster, 
Calming nerve system
